name: Run Dataset Builder + Dashboard Designer
description: When Agent 1 creates the plan, automatically run Agent 2 (dataset builder) and Agent 3 (dashboard designer)

then.prompt:
The plan has been created at output/plan.json. Now execute two steps in sequence:

1. DATASET BUILDER: Read output/plan.json and agents/agent2-dataset-builder.md. Follow the agent2 instructions to create output/dataset-config.json with direct Redshift table references and QuickSight-native joins. No SQL.

2. DASHBOARD DESIGNER: Read output/plan.json, output/dataset-config.json, and agents/agent3-dashboard-designer.md. Follow the agent3 instructions to create output/dashboard-definition.json with the complete AnalysisDefinition (visuals, layout, parameters, filters). Use the patterns from .kiro/steering/quicksight-visuals.md.

After both files are created, tell the user the dashboard is ready and show them how to deploy with: python scripts/deploy.py --cleanup
